products.name: Extra virgin Olive Oil 250 ml
products.description: Hand-picked from our family grove in North Sinai. Cold pressed, made from Picual olives, and 100% natural with no additives or chemicals.

products.name: Extra virgin Olive Oil 500 ml
products.description: Hand-picked from our family grove in North Sinai. Cold pressed, made from Picual olives, and 100% natural with no additives or chemicals.

about.title: Our Story
about.content: Sohayb Grove is a family business that started with the planting of the first olive tree by Sohayb’s father, the project wasn’t just simple agricultural project, it was the start of a true value that combines the family’s passion with the quality of the land from North Sinai. We offer premium olive oil for a unique experience worthy of you.

reviews.name: Ahmed Eid
reviews.comment: El zeit zatoun helw awi msa

reviews.name: Eng.abdelrahman
reviews.comment: جميل جدا ... ريحته حلوة و طعمه جميل تسلم ايدكم

reviews.name: Abdullah
reviews.comment: مساء الخير الزيت كجودة كان جميل وطعمه راق ليا جدا والباكديج للمنتج وصلي متغلف كويس واحييكم علي اللي غلف المنتج التغليف الممتاز دا عشان حصلي اكتر من مره مشكلة بسبب المناديب اللي بتوصلي الحاجه مكسوره او مكببوبه للاسف... فشكرا ليكم

reviews.name: Fatma saad
reviews.comment: كل حاجة حلوة جدا من افضل انواع الزيت اللي جربتها في حياتي وانا بشرب معلقة منه فا مش على الاكل بس وطعمه تحفة  والتغليف كمان
